_comment: Benchmark inputs for the splice path. The driver generates voice x greeting x body x runs. greeting.category drives per-category fail-rate buckets; stress greetings probe edge cases (long names, non-ascii names, punctuation, repeats).

bodies.text: This is Alex, Director of Customer Support from Rixtrema.
I hope your day is going well. I would like to get a few minutes of your time to learn more about your business and your retirement plan. Do you have 15-20 minutes over the next week or two?
I am calling with a quick follow up about your retirement plan.
